{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/technology-combinations/combinations/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "combinations"
tags:
  * technology-combinations
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. combinations

_Файлов:_ 35

h2. Содержание

* [[01-pravilnaya-agentskaya-arkhitektura-svyazi-pattern|01-pravilnaya-agentskaya-arkhitektura-svyazi-pattern.md]] — 
* [[02-multiagentnyy-khaos-reshenie-auto-ai-router|02-multiagentnyy-khaos-reshenie-auto-ai-router.md]] — 
* [[03-crdt-local-first-svyazi-cardindex|03-crdt-local-first-svyazi-cardindex.md]] — 
* [[04-parsing-s-llm-graph-rag-pravilnaya-agentskaya-arkhitektura|04-parsing-s-llm-graph-rag-pravilnaya-agentskaya-arkhitektura.md]] — 
* [[05-sourcecraft-cli-claude-code-sequential-protokol-dochkinoy|05-sourcecraft-cli-claude-code-sequential-protokol-dochkinoy.md]] — 
* [[06-openclaude-utyokshiy-claude-code-zinc-inference-engine-mome-|06-openclaude-utyokshiy-claude-code-zinc-inference-engine-mome-.md]] — 
* [[07-crawl4ai-docling-yodoca-consolidator|07-crawl4ai-docling-yodoca-consolidator.md]] — 
* [[08-conductor-adversarial-review-auto-ai-router|08-conductor-adversarial-review-auto-ai-router.md]] — 
* [[09-agent-orchestration-stack|09-agent-orchestration-stack.md]] — 
* [[10-legal-document-intelligence-pipeline|10-legal-document-intelligence-pipeline.md]] — 
* [[11-hybrid-crdt-sql-database|11-hybrid-crdt-sql-database.md]] — 
* [[12-multi-agent-observability-stack|12-multi-agent-observability-stack.md]] — 
* [[13-legal-document-transpiler|13-legal-document-transpiler.md]] — 
* [[14-local-first-agent-development-environment|14-local-first-agent-development-environment.md]] — 
* [[15-self-consolidating-legal-corpus|15-self-consolidating-legal-corpus.md]] — 
* [[16-adversarial-multi-agent-code-review|16-adversarial-multi-agent-code-review.md]] — 
* [[17-distributed-agent-memory-with-graph|17-distributed-agent-memory-with-graph.md]] — 
* [[18-llm-powered-legal-corpus-builder|18-llm-powered-legal-corpus-builder.md]] — 
* [[19-multi-agent-observability-platform|19-multi-agent-observability-platform.md]] — 
* [[20-hybrid-olap-oltp-with-real-time-sync|20-hybrid-olap-oltp-with-real-time-sync.md]] — 
* [[21-legal-corpus-analytics-at-scale|21-legal-corpus-analytics-at-scale.md]] — 
* [[22-russian-international-oss-stack|22-russian-international-oss-stack.md]] — 
* [[23-security-first-code-review-pipeline|23-security-first-code-review-pipeline.md]] — 
* [[24-mega-integration-full-stack|24-mega-integration-full-stack.md]] — 
* [[25-legal-dsl-code-transpiler|25-legal-dsl-code-transpiler.md]] — 
* [[26-ast-based-code-analysis-for-legal-automation|26-ast-based-code-analysis-for-legal-automation.md]] — 
* [[27-hybrid-rag-with-ast-chunked-code|27-hybrid-rag-with-ast-chunked-code.md]] — 
* [[28-pydantic-enforced-legal-workflows|28-pydantic-enforced-legal-workflows.md]] — 
* [[29-meta-programmatic-legal-template-generator|29-meta-programmatic-legal-template-generator.md]] — 
* [[30-mega-stack-3-0-with-dsl-ast|30-mega-stack-3-0-with-dsl-ast.md]] — 
* [[31-event-sourced-legal-document-history|31-event-sourced-legal-document-history.md]] — 
* [[32-consensus-based-multi-agent-coordination|32-consensus-based-multi-agent-coordination.md]] — > [!TIP]
* [[33-event-sourcing-cqrs-clickhouse-analytics|33-event-sourcing-cqrs-clickhouse-analytics.md]] — 
* [[34-distributed-event-store-with-paxos|34-distributed-event-store-with-paxos.md]] — 
* [[35-mega-stack-4-0-with-event-sourcing-consensus|35-mega-stack-4-0-with-event-sourcing-consensus.md]] — > [!TIP]



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[components-by-name]] (сходство 0.27)
* [[15-19-extended]] (сходство 0.24)
* [[09-14-extended]] (сходство 0.22)
